authority.department: Labour Department, Government of NCT of Delhi

overview: State-specific labour law requirements applicable to establishments operating in the National Capital Territory of Delhi.

rules.title: Review Delhi Shops and Establishments Registration
rules.description: Determine whether registration under the Delhi Shops and Establishments Act is applicable.

rules.title: Maintain Statutory Registers and Employment Records
rules.description: Maintain statutory registers, employee records and prescribed notices required under Delhi labour laws.

rules.title: Display Statutory Notices
rules.description: Display statutory notices, abstracts and employee information required under Delhi labour legislation.

rules.title: Review Working Hours, Leave and Weekly Holiday Compliance
rules.description: Ensure compliance with Delhi-specific provisions governing working hours, overtime, weekly holidays and employee leave.

rules.title: Review Minimum Wage Notifications
rules.description: Ensure employee wages comply with the latest minimum wage notifications issued for Delhi.

rules.title: Review Professional Tax Applicability
rules.description: Delhi presently does not levy Professional Tax. Monitor future legislative changes if applicable.

recommended.title: Annual Labour Compliance Audit
recommended.description: Conduct an annual review covering registrations, wage compliance, statutory records and labour inspections.

recommended.title: Digital Compliance Calendar
recommended.description: Maintain a digital compliance calendar for labour filings, inspections, licence renewals and statutory due dates.
